titlestmt.titleproper: David Birnbach New York State Dept. of Mental Hygiene Oral History records6821

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: David Birnbach New York State Dept. of Mental Hygiene Oral History records
did.abstract: Audio recordings and transcriptions of interviews David Birnbach conducted with former staff of New York State mental hospitals.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: David Birnbach worked at New York State's Suffolk Developmental Center from 1977-1979 and at Willard Psychiatric Center from 1979-1983.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Audio recordings and transcriptions of interviews David Birnbach conducted with former staff of New York State mental hospitals including Willard, Gowanda, St. Lawrence, Rochester, Sunmount, Pilgrim, and Rockland in 1983 and 1984. The interviews from Gowanda were the most comprehensive. Also particularly important are interviews from St. Lawrence, the first state hospital in the nation to open all its locked wards, and Rochester with its focus on leadership and integration in an urban setting. Also included are research materials on the subject and a draft of Birnbach's research results finished in 2002 and titled "Before, during, and shortly after the custody, care and treatment revolution: An oral history of the New York State Department of Mental Hygiene, 1928-1983."

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: David Birnbach New York State Dept. of Mental Hygiene Oral History records, #6821. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to the complete list of names restricted to the permission of the archivist.

userestrict.head: Restrictions on Use:
userestrict.p: This collection may only be used for consultation.|No reproductions can be made without permission of the archivist.|No publication of information within this collection can be made without permission of the archivist.|Use of names from this collection anywhere may only be done with permission of the archivist. A name index of the interviewees is available offline. Researchers may request confirmation of inclusion of individuals in the collection by name.
